## Summary

Describe the user-facing and technical outcome of this change.

## Scope

- [ ] Runtime behavior
- [ ] API contract
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Operations

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run verify:backend`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run build`

## Documentation / Source of Truth

- [ ] If behavior changed, `docs/HANDSHAKE_CURRENT_STATE.md` was updated (or explicitly left unchanged with a reason).
- [ ] README remains presentation-only (no hidden "truth" moved there).

## Release Impact

- [ ] No release impact
- [ ] Patch
- [ ] Minor
- [ ] Major (breaking change)

## Changelog

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`

## Repo Hygiene

- [ ] No binaries committed (models under `ops/models/*.gguf` must stay local / gitignored)
